excerpt: Only by passing through these five gates can the believer attain true understanding and develop genuine ikhlas (sincerity) of faith.
source_location_hint: Chapters on the five chapters of tawhid

excerpt: The number seven, arising from the pairing of the natiq and the asas, denotes the seven Imams present in each era.
source_location_hint: On the seven intellects and their correspondence to the Imams

excerpt: The First and Second Intellects testified to the Lord of the Universe, and the Prophet confirmed their testimony.
